summary: Remove dead import guards, an unused accumulator, a duplicated lookup key, and recomputed values across novel paths.
reason: Targeted cleanup pass: behavior-preserving, no flag/output changes. Removes the `var _ = strings.ReplaceAll` and `var _ = time.Now` compile guards (their packages are already used), drops `totalClicks` from KeywordCannibalization (collected and discarded), dedupes the `ad_group` lookup key in keyword snapshot ingestion, computes `splitCSV(keywords)` once in share-of-voice output, and reuses `sentCount` in applyAutomationMutation instead of recomputing it from `body any`.
validated_outcome: go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./cmd/amazon-ads-pp-cli ./cmd/amazon-ads-pp-mcp, and verify-skill (35 recipes, 0 findings) all pass.
